title: lactuca elongata var. longifolia
intro: Lactuca elongata var. longifolia, also known as American lettuce or long-leaved wild lettuce, is a perennial plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and relieve pain. The health benefits of Lactuca elongata var. longifolia include reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and calming the nervous system, making it a popular natural remedy for insomnia and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Lactuca elongata var. longifolia can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
